name: docker build
description: Build a Docker image from a Dockerfile and a build context directory

options.label: Tag
options.description: Name and optionally tag the image (e.g., myapp:latest)

options.label: Dockerfile
options.description: Path to the Dockerfile to use (default is ./Dockerfile)

options.label: No cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image, rebuilding all layers from scratch

options.label: Target stage
options.description: Set the target build stage for multi-stage Dockerfiles

positionalArgs.label: Build context
positionalArgs.description: Path to the build context directory containing the Dockerfile and source files

examples.label: Build and tag an image from the current directory
Build with no cache and custom Dockerfile
Build with a specific tag and version argument
Build a specific target stage from multi-stage Dockerfile
Full rebuild with no cache and build arguments
